response.justification: The candidate's resume shows an extensive but highly outdated career spanning over 25 years, with most relevant experience dating back to the early 2000s and heavy reliance on obsolete technologies like DLang and Ember.js; there is no evidence of recent, hands-on work with modern React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL as required, and the claimed seniority contradicts the entry-level nature of the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership history
Deep understanding of software architecture and testing practices
concerns: No recent evidence of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL usage in the last 5+ years
Overqualified and likely misaligned with junior/mid-level individual contributor role
Outdated tech stack (DLang, Ember.js, CMSushi) dominates portfolio over modern tools
